
MCMC Diagnostics {data-navmenu="Diagnostics"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### MCMC Summary

```{r mcmc_summary}
diag <- mv$mcmc_diagnostics
info_df <- data.frame(
  Property = c("Number of iterations",
               "Parameters sampled"),
  Value = c(
    if (!is.null(diag$n_iter))
      as.character(diag$n_iter) else "Unknown",
    if (!is.null(diag$parameters))
      as.character(length(diag$parameters)) else "Unknown"
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
knitr::kable(
  x         = info_df,
  caption   = "MCMC diagnostics summary",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

### Spawning Biomass Posterior

```{r mcmc_sb}
mv_plot_trend(
  df    = mv$spawning_biomass,
  ylab  = "Spawning biomass",
  title = "Spawning Biomass (with 95% CI from MCMC)"
)
```

### Recruitment Posterior

```{r mcmc_rec}
mv_plot_trend(
  df     = mv$recruitment,
  ylab   = "Recruitment",
  colour = "#2ca02c",
  title  = "Recruitment (with 95% CI from MCMC)"
)
```
